causal_question: Among voting-eligible citizens observed in both elections, how did transitioning from having any positive household taxable income in 2004 to reporting zero taxable household income by 2008 affect turnout in the 2008 election, relative to individuals who reported positive taxable income in both years?
vague_question: Did people who went from having some household taxable income in 2004 to having none by 2008 vote less in the 2008 election than people whose income stayed positive?
